summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Incorrect device name on DFU success screen while updating just the Charge Stand
scenario: After updating only the Charge Stand via DFU, the success screen shows the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
description_clean: When updating only the Charge Stand via DFU, the success screen incorrectly displays the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
steps: 1. Connect the Charge Stand to the system.
2. Initiate a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the Charge Stand only.
3. Wait for the update process to complete.
4. Observe the success screen displayed after the update.
expected: The success screen should display the Charge Stand name.
actual: The success screen incorrectly displays the headset name instead of the Charge Stand name.
